title: /receive shows address without unsynced-wallet warning
description: /balance warns the user when scan_tip == 0 ('wallet has never synced — run nie wallet sync'). /receive does not. A user who runs /receive on a fresh wallet, shares the address, receives ZEC, then immediately runs /balance sees 0 ZEC and no explanation of why. Adding the same scan_tip == 0 guard to /receive ('Address shown, but wallet not yet synced — run nie wallet sync before checking balance') aligns the two commands and prevents the confusing state.
close_reason: Fixed: /receive now checks scan_tip after printing the address; if scan_tip == 0 prints 'Wallet has not synced yet. Run nie wallet sync before sharing this address so incoming payments are visible.' Matches /balance behavior.
